title: Level 647/offset
wikitext:
{{VoidedThemeV2}} {{DISPLAYTITLE:?}} {{Collapse |num=FORGETIT |initial=[[File:VHSLEVEL647.png|240px|center]] |final=[[File:VHSLEVEL647.png|240px|center]] |body=[[File:BACKROOMS FERRY LINE VIDEOFORLEVEL647.mp4|center]] {{Imagebox |file=The-blank-vertical-white-grunge-old-classic-texture-paper-sheet-background-KGFMFA.png |outer-style=border:1px solid white; padding:15px 15px; margin:3em |inner-style=font-family:Caveat; text-shadow:0em 0em 1em #000000, 0em 0em 1em #000000; font-size:18px; color:#e6e6e6 |align=left |opacity=0.25 |height=9000px |text=May 12th 2008 11.30 I finally found this damn diary after 3 fucking weeks apparently one of those fucking faceys from down the cleaning department lost my diary! I've worked at this backrooms ferry line ship for a while now was it a bit over a year? Might have been yea but this backjet ship has been meh to work at since the suckers that own the line pay us in basically middle fingers because the only good thing about working for these fuckers is that I get free food and accommodation... Also it feels like most of the advertisements for this line are complete bullshit about the crew being trained for emergency situations... None of us in the crew know what to do in emergencies like the ship sinking or us noclipping into a dangerous level. Also, the damn captain isn't even a former captain from the frontrooms he's some cashier who worked on a Finnish ferry in the frontrooms who got sent to jail for harassment. Soon I luckily won't have to work for a few weeks since they'll send this ship for some major renovations down in uuh... I forgot the level name I can't remember even where we sail to most of the time! June 20th 2008 12.54 Finally we got the ship off the renovations about a week or two ago, and I captured some photos during when the renovations took place! [[File:Beforetheincidentship.png|center|480px]] [[File:Art on the ship 647.png|center|480px]] [[File:Shipinport.png|center|480px]] Last night while i was out in the ol ship bar with a couple of pals from the bridge suddenly the whole ship started feeling and sounding like it was hitting ground and getting beached somewhere for some reason? After a couple seconds of it happening we went to check if anything happened to the ship and apparently it was most likely that creature on this level 7 doing some crazy shit in the sea. After that i went to take a couple of drinks before heading off to bed to snooze off the motherfuckin hangover which i right now am having. August 12th 2008 17.42 It's been couple weeks since we had that one thing happen to the ship and suddenly right now it feels like the whole ship has been decaying extremely fast! We even had the damn renovations about a month ago and now a month later the whole ship feels like it hasn't been updated for 20 something years. Suddenly mold is growing on the interior of the ship, plumbing system constantly doesn't seem to work all of a sudden, lights go out constantly on the ship and the whole place feels like we have not maintained it for decades. We found recently a bunch naked faceys in the fucking supplies room where we store the food. Luckily I think we most likely killed them and threw them overboard before they managed to contaminate the food. I at least should remember not to eat the ship food for a couple of weeks. September 12th 2008 19.24 So im writing this like right now? All of a sudden a few moments ago the goddamn sky went darker than the ass of a smiler. Also the damn hermes drive didnt start up for some reason and and and the map doesnt work the radios doesnt work anything wont work because most likely some fucking overweight bitchless idiot at meg or who ever the hell makes the hermes drives DIDNT TEST IT! Now we are going to figure out where the hell we are and what caused it. Im soon gon go real quick to the engine room where the hermes thingy resides and going to check what happened. September 12th 2008 19.34 So right now im on deck 5 or 6 in the main staircase and im hearin all these sounds outside and the ship is suddenly listing a goddamn alot! It sounds like the ships creaking and breaking apart from inside! Right now im at deck 3 or the car deck or whatever its called! it sounds like the whole car deck is flooding with something and everything is going to shit! NONE OF THE CREW KNOWS WHAT TO DO! Ok right im at the engine room where all the engine workers are complaining about the hermes thingy not simply working because why the fuck not at this moment??? We dont know what the hell to do anymore like right now it sounds like the ship is collapsing on itself oh nice it looks like the hermes device is wor September ??? 2008 So I just woke up at this [[Level 100|Beach]] of some kind? I just walked some kilometers and I just found a couple of those lucky engine room workers and a few faceys who survived sitting on the beach with a few of them staring into the endless sea with a thousand meter stare. One of them just told me that apparently only the people who were in the engine room survived whatever the hell just happened. At this point I'm going to try to find a way to level 1 or what ever level I want to settle in because not going to lie I'm quitting... I'm probably going to give M.E.G or what ever I find first this diary and some photos which I took during the hassle. Im tired of this fucking shit im quitting. }} {{Collapse |num= |initial=[[File:Newspaperforlevelbecauseiwastoolazy.png|240px|center]] |final=[[File:Newspaperforlevelbecauseiwastoolazy.png|240px|center]] |body=[[File:Screenshot because original idea went to shit because i refreshed accidentally.png|1080px|center]] ----
